question: Which of the following statements best describes the pond in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The pond is turbulent and has large waves. (B) The pond is murky and has a dark color. (C) The pond is calm and blue, with a small size. (D) The pond is completely dry.
gold_answer: The pond is murky and has a dark color
answer_choices: The pond is turbulent and has large waves
The pond is murky and has a dark color
The pond is calm and blue, with a small size
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
